use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in SaaS dashboards
Form submission buttons with loading states
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and navigation
Multi-variant buttons for status indication (primary, secondary, error, warning)
Accessibility-friendly buttons with proper disabled states
ai_summary: Shugar Button is a versatile, minimalist button component featuring multiple size variants (tiny to large), type variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, warning), and shape options (square, circle, rounded). Supports prefix/suffix icons, loading states with spinner, disabled states, and full-width layout. Designed with Tailwind CSS classes for clean, flat aesthetics suitable for SaaS and developer tool interfaces.
